chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1491 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 14.11.2016. None present for the petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w ASI Ghulam Mustafa of P.S Samaro and PC Amir Hassan of P.S Kot Ghulam Muhammad. = The learned A.A.G has filed written reply on behalf of official respondents as well as police report about the dispute in question Today, M/s. Abdul Aziz Memon, Advocate, Rana Sohail Mehmood, Advocate and Syed Zafar Ali Shah, Advocate have filed their respective Vakalatnamas on behalf of private respondents, which are taken on record. The learned Counsel for the respondents submit that their clients/respondents have not caused any harassment to the petitioners. From the perusal of petition, it appears that primarily it is a property dispute regarding which any party, if have any grievance, can seek its redressal through due process of law. This petition is disposed of with the directions that the private respondents will desist from causing any harassment to the petitioners and the officials respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and should provide protection to the petitioners, if they are approached with such a requests. JUDGE Shahid
